69.reason: [Error: The loop condition should be i < m, not i < len-1, because ans array may have fewer characters than len-1 (since the decimal point was removed). This causes the output to miss the last digit(s) of the mantissa, as seen in the buggy output missing the final '9'.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should be i < m, not i < len-1, because ans array may have fewer characters than len-1 (since the decimal point was removed). This causes the output to miss the last digit(s) of the mantissa, as seen in the buggy output missing the final '9'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The loop condition uses len-1, but the number of digits stored in ans is len-1 (since the decimal point is removed), so this prints only len-2 characters, missing the last digit. Should be i < m to print all stored digits.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop should iterate until i<len to include the last digit, otherwise the last digit of the mantissa is omitted.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop bound should be i < len to include the last digit of the fractional part]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition `i<len-1` causes the last character of the significant digits (stored in `ans`) to be skipped. It should be `i<m` to print all constructed characters in `ans`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition `i<len-1` causes the last digit of the mantissa to be skipped. The array `ans` contains `len` characters (indices 0 to len-1), but the loop only prints up to index `len-2`. It should be `i < m` or `i < len`.
